_schema_info.part_of: ASRO — Attestation and System Reliability Operator Evidence Framework
_schema_info.description: Canonical controlled vocabularies for all ASRO attestation bundle fields. All values in attestation bundles must come from these vocabularies. Unregistered values trigger UNKNOWN_EVENT_TYPE discrepancy.

event_types._description: Load-bearing event types that must be attested. All events that occur during operation must use one of these values. Protected events cannot be reclassified as non-load-bearing.
event_types._note: Protected classes are the minimum telemetry floor per MAS v1.1 Section 4.3 and Section 13. These cannot be reclassified as non-load-bearing or omitted.

runtime_modes._description: Declared operational modes for the AI runtime.

outage_cause_classes._description: Controlled vocabulary for cause_class in outage.declared events. No other values are permitted. Per MAS v1.1 Section 14.

reason_codes._description: Reason codes for load-bearing events. Provide context for policy decisions and state transitions.

attestation_status._description: Trust status values for Trust Status Records and badge display. These are the only permitted status values.

host_attested.description: Operator-side Host Meter Agent operational. Load-bearing events attested. No active S3 or S4 flags. No claim of edge reconciliation.

reconciled_attested.description: Host attestation active AND meaningful edge observation is technically possible AND ASRO reconciliation active. No active S3 or S4 flags.

under_review.description: Active S3 or S4 discrepancy. Trust status not clean. Operator response pending or under review.

non_compliant.description: System cannot credibly claim current ASRO attestation compliance. External resolution required before status restored.

continuity_states._description: Chain continuity status values for ASRO reconciliation records. Note: collision (same sequence, different hash) is S4 critical and distinct from duplicate (same sequence, same hash) which is S0 informational.

visibility_classes._description: Edge Meter Agent visibility declaration values. metadata_only must be declared when response hash is unavailable. Absence of this declaration implies full witness capability is available.
visibility_classes._note: If visibility_class is not declared, full edge witness capability is assumed. metadata_only is the only exception value requiring explicit declaration per MAS v1.1 Section 6.2.

discrepancy_hints._description: Edge-side discrepancy hint values for EWB optional fields.

observed_state_flags._description: Controlled vocabulary for EWB observed_state_flags array. These flags describe observable conditions at the edge.

compliance_classes._description: Deployment compliance class declarations. Determines applicable max_event_latency_ms ceiling.

maintenance_activity_classes._description: Controlled vocabulary for maintenance-class activity during declared outage windows. MAS v1.1 Section 14 requires maintenance activity to use 'a value from the maintenance_activity_classes vocabulary' — this schema defines that vocabulary. Activity during a declared outage that does not use one of these values requires separate attested justification or escalates to review-triggering.
maintenance_activity_classes._distinct_from: outage_cause_classes — cause_class describes WHY an outage occurred; maintenance_activity_class describes WHAT activity is being performed during it.

trust_status_reason_codes._description: Reason codes for Trust Status Record status_reason_code field.
